reason: Successfully tested agent communication workflow - sent math question to agent and received correct numerical response
steps: Step 1 - Navigate to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully navigated to the Super Agent application home page showing three agents in the sidebar
Step 2 - Find and click "QA-20260327-000408-mnls" agent in sidebar - Successfully located the target agent in the sidebar list and clicked it to open the agent detail page
Step 3 - Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status was "idle" (blue indicator), which meets the requirement for either "running" or "idle"
Step 4 - Send message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Successfully typed the message into the landing page input field and sent it using Cmd+Enter keyboard shortcut
Step 5 - Wait up to 3 minutes for response - Agent responded in 2 seconds with the message displayed in chat view, showing "Agent took 2s" processing time
Step 6 - Verify response mentions "4" - Agent response clearly displays "4." in the chat window, confirming the correct answer to the math question was provided
